nasb.text: So they pulled Jeremiah up with the ropes and lifted him out of the cistern, and Jeremiah stayed in the court of the guardhouse.

esv.text: Then they drew Jeremiah up with ropes and lifted him out of the cistern. And Jeremiah remained in the court of the guard.

cnv.text: 於是他們用繩子把耶利米從井裡拉出來；這樣，耶利米可以住在衛兵的院子裡。

ccb.text: 他们便把耶利米从池中拉上来拘留在护卫兵的院子里。
